enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic emotions.

What is the plot context of the movie Kavalai Vendam?

The movie revolves around love and relationships, exploring the complexities of modern romance.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah, Dinesh Kanakaratnam, and Inno Genga.

Who wrote the lyrics for En Pulse Yethitu Poriye?

The lyrics were penned by Ko Sesha, adding a poetic touch to the song.

When was the song released?

The song was released on November 6, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In En Pulse Yethitu Poriye, the characters express their deep emotional connection through a melodic duet that beautifully encapsulates the essence of love. The song's lyrics reflect themes of longing and affection, resonating with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of romance. Set against the backdrop of Kavalai Vendam, it enhances the narrative by showcasing the characters' emotional struggles. The collaboration of Andrea Jeremiah, Dinesh Kanakaratnam, and Inno Genga brings a unique charm to this romantic melody.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: En Pulse Yethitu Poriye from Kavalai Vendam is a beautifully crafted romantic duet that captures the essence of love and longing. Featuring the soulful voices of Andrea Jeremiah, Dinesh Kanakaratnam, and Inno Genga, this song weaves a melodic tapestry that resonates with listeners. The heartfelt lyrics by Ko Sesha elevate the emotional depth, making it a must-listen for anyone in love.
stanzaMeanings: Like the breeze through the window, it has come to my heart, like a lightning strike, your name is engraved in me.
You should give your face, your presence is enough to enchant me, my love will leave me there.
My heart is beating for you, will you listen to all my desires if I tell you?
My pulse is racing, you are the one, like a star, my pulse is racing, you are the one, my love.
My pulse is racing, you are the one, like a star, my pulse is racing, you are the one, my love.

Something is happening inside me because of you, I am searching for the flags of your life to unite with you.

I wanna hold you close to me everyday.
You know about me, you don't need to know my face, my dreams will reveal everything.
Your love is my ecstasy, baby.
Like a butterfly, playing around, the world knows you as it flies around you.
I wanna hold you close to me everyday, do you understand? The fruit of love is sweet, like a flower's fragrance.
Your love is my ecstasy, baby, I have fallen for you, my dear.
You should give your face, your presence is enough to enchant me, my love will leave me there.
